_comment: Example failure history for axes-mapper.js. Try: node tools/clis/axes-mapper.js --history tools/clis/examples/incident-history.json --top 3

incidents.summary: kafka consumer lag triggered queue depth alarm
feature flag misconfig disabled checkout for 14 minutes
payment processor timeout cascaded into cart drops
auth service deploy rolled back after 503s
kafka rebalance during peak caused 8min processing pause
feature flag race condition served wrong pricing
OAuth refresh storm overwhelmed auth service
consumer group offset reset replayed 6h of events
feature flag SDK version drift caused inconsistent rollouts
DB connection pool exhausted under spike
auth JWT signing key rotation skew
